metadata.dataSource: NPS API + USGS Trail Data + Recreation.gov RIDB

pages.title: Yosemite Valley Hiking Trails Guide
pages.content: Comprehensive guide to hiking trails in Yosemite National Park including Half Dome, Mist Trail, and Lower Yosemite Fall. Features detailed information on trail difficulty, elevation gain, estimated completion times, and seasonal considerations.

pages.title: Appalachian Trail Camping Essentials
pages.content: Essential camping tips for Appalachian Trail hikers including gear recommendations, shelter selection, fire regulations, and Leave No Trace principles. Covers both established campgrounds and dispersed camping options.

pages.title: Great Smoky Mountains Beginner Hikes
pages.content: Perfect beginner hiking trails in the Great Smoky Mountains National Park. Easy to moderate trails with stunning scenery and wildlife viewing opportunities.
pages.location: Great Smoky Mountains National Park, Tennessee/North Carolina

pages.title: Zion National Park Angels Landing
pages.content: One of the most iconic and challenging hikes in Zion National Park. This strenuous trail offers thrilling cliff-hugging experiences with breathtaking panoramic views.
